title: xolisma ovalifolia var. lanceolata
intro: Xolisma ovalifolia var. lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved xolisma, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. It is characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xolisma ovalifolia var. lanceolata include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
